response.original_title: Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs - Full Performance (Live on KEXP) | August 20, 2025
response.overview: http://KEXP.ORG presents Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs Pigs performing live in the KEXP gathering space. Recorded August 20, 2025  Songs: The Wyrm 00:25 Blockage 07:52 Carousel 11:16 Stitches 16:25 Collider 22:09  Adam Ian Sykes -  Guitar  Matt Baty - Vocals Simon Hubbard - Bass Ewan Mackenzie - Drums Sam Grant - Guitar  Host: Atticus George-Andrijeski Audio Engineers: Kevin Suggs, Brandon Fitzsimons, Kirsten Hettinger Guest Audio Engineer: Bridge Williams Audio Mixer: Sam Grant Mastering: Matt Ogaz  Cameras: Jim Beckmann, Carlos Cruz, Scott Holpainen, Luke Knecht, Kendall Rock & Ettie Wahl Editor: Scott Holpainen
